<!-- ::: {.module-header-row} // ::: {.module-header} -->
<!-- NOTE: quarto gives a warning about the above comment since it contains ":::" -->

::: {.module-header-row}
![](resources/manure.png){width=140px}

# Manure Module
:::


## Introduction

### Example of a Figure

<!--just a figure-->
::: {.text-end}
![](resources/manure.png){width=50%}
:::



### Example of a Table
| Variable | Definition |
|---|---|
| heiferI_num | Number of Heifer I animals |

: Example animal inputs {#tbl-animal-inputs}
